name: job-application-assistant-openclaw
description: OpenClaw skill bundle for continuing this repo's job application workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Thin OpenClaw wrapper around this repo's CLI and browser automation.
interface.longDescription: Uses the existing local dashboard, attached Chrome flow, and browser commands in this repository so OpenClaw can continue job applications without replacing the automation stack.
defaultPrompt: Continue my LinkedIn job applications in this repo.
Start the dashboard and attached Chrome workflow.
Review saved jobs and continue the apply flow.
